de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class AbstractPO

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractPO
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IPersistablePO, ProofOblInput
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractOperationPO, DependencyContractPO, WellDefinednessPO

    public abstract class AbstractPO
extends Object
implements IPersistablePO
    An abstract proof obligation implementing common functionality.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      (package private) static class  AbstractPO.Vertex
      Represents a vertex and additional information required by the Tarjan algorithm.

      • choicesApply

        private boolean choicesApply(Taclet taclet,
                   ImmutableSet<Choice> choices)
        Check whether a taclet conforms with the currently active choices. I.e., whether the taclet's given choices is a subset of choices.

      • registerClassAxiomTaclets

        private void registerClassAxiomTaclets(KeYJavaType selfKJT,
                             InitConfig proofConfig)
        adds all taclets for the class axioms accessible and needed by this PO
        Parameters:
        selfKJT - the KeYJavaType for which to collect all accessible class axioms
        proofConfig - the InitConfig of the proof for this PO

      • getSCCForNode

        private void getSCCForNode(AbstractPO.Vertex node,
                 ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> axioms,
                 InitConfig proofConfig)
        computes all strongly connected components reachable by the given node and adds them to allSCCs
        Parameters:
        node - the starting AbstractPO.Vertex
        axioms - set of ClassAxiom used to compute the outgoing edges of the nodes
        proofConfig - the InitConfig of the proof for this PO

      • getPO

        public final ProofAggregate getPO()
        Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
        Returns the proof obligation term as result of the proof obligation input. If there is still no input available because nothing has been read yet null is returned.
        Specified by:
        getPO in interface ProofOblInput

      • implies

        public boolean implies(ProofOblInput po)
        Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
        If true, then this PO implies the passed one.
        Specified by:
        implies in interface ProofOblInput

      • assignPOTerms

        protected void assignPOTerms(Term... poTerms)

      • fillSaveProperties

        public void fillSaveProperties(Properties properties)
                        throws IOException
        This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
        Specified by:
        fillSaveProperties in interface IPersistablePO
        Parameters:
        properties - The Properties to fill with the proof obligation specific settings.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • getName

        public static String getName(Properties properties)
        Returns the name value from the given properties.
        Parameters:
        properties - The properties to read from.
        Returns:
        The name value.

      • getContainerType

        public KeYJavaType getContainerType()
        Returns the KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in.
        Specified by:
        getContainerType in interface ProofOblInput
        Returns:
        The KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in or null if not available.
